description: Chrome Verified Access lets enterprise network services verify that ChromeOS or Chrome browser clients are genuine, managed, and policy-compliant. It is used in enterprise access scenarios such as VPNs, intranet pages, and certificate-based network access.
summary: verifiedaccess.googleapis.com exposes one REST API, the Chrome Verified Access API, authenticated with either a Google OAuth 2.0 access token for the Verified Access scope or a Google Cloud API key.
